free_text: Quasifree 5He+3He -> alpha+alpha reaction process in
the 9Be(3He,alpha,alpha)4He reaction at E(3He)=4.0 MeV
Department of Physics, Faculty of Science
Department of Physics, Faculty of General
Education
ANG1 is polar angle between beam and alpha in
laboratory system
Beam intensity is about 200 nA.
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness is about 0.120 mg/cm**2.
- Target is self supported.
Detect alpha and alpha in coincidence.
Solid angle of detector is 1.5 msr.
To detect coincident pairs of particles
emitted from target
Ot + Sr. Re-digitized
Kc + Sr + On. Converted from NRDF D1518

laboratory system
